scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:template
scripts.deploy:functions: cd functions && npm install && cd .. && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:admin: npm run build:admin && firebase deploy --only hosting:admin
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run deploy:admin && npm run deploy:template
scripts.publish:packages: npm publish -w packages/landing-core && npm publish -w packages/landing-ui
